case_title: CITIBROKERS, INCORPORATED VS. BENJAMIN J BREZLER ET AL

docket_entries.description: ORDER DENYING WAIVER OF COURT FEES AND COSTS PURSUANT TO G.C. 68634 (E), CRC 3.52 AS TO DEFENDANT BREZLER, BENJAMIN J AN INDIVIDUAL

MASTER MOTION CALENDAR ON OCT-15-2014 IN 206, HEARING ON APPLICANT/DEFENDANT BENJAMIN BREZLER'S WAIVER OF COURT FEES AND COSTS. NO APPEARANCE BY APPLICANT. THE COURT DENIED THE APPLICATION IN WHOLE. ORDER SIGNED, AND ENDORSED-FILED COPY MAILED TO APPLICANT. JUDGE: CYNTHIA M. LEE; CLERK: D. LOK; COURT REPORTER: MATTER NOT REPORTED. (206)

REQUEST PENDING TO WAIVE COURT FEES AND COSTS PURSUANT TO G.C. 68633, CRC 3.51, 8.26, AND 8.818 (CONFIDENTIAL) FILED BY DEFENDANT BREZLER, BENJAMIN J AN INDIVIDUAL HEARING SET FOR OCT-15-2014 AT 09:00 AM IN DEPT 206
DISMISSAL OF ENTIRE ACTION OF ALL PARTIES AND ALL CAUSES OF ACTION WITHOUT PREJUDICE

UNLAWFUL DETAINER - RESIDENTIAL, COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF CITIBROKERS, INCORPORATED AS TO DEFENDANT BREZLER, BENJAMIN J AN INDIVIDUAL JACOB JAMES AFLEUR, AN INDIVIDUAL DARCY MARIE ASBE, AN INDIVIDUAL DOES 1 TO 10, INCLUSIVE SUMMONS ISSUED, JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED
